title: cerastium parvum
intro: Cerastium parvum, also known as small mouse-ear or field mouse-ear, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cerastium parvum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tincture or infused in tea, and it is also used in topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
